message:
feat(cli): resolve --verbose and --dry-run through shared flag fallback for all robot commands

Wire up resolveRobotSharedBool for agent-health --verbose,
smart-restart --verbose/--dry-run, pipeline-run --dry-run, and
replay --dry-run so the shared canonical flags (--verbose, --dry-run)
correctly propagate when command-specific overrides are absent.

Update the capabilities registry to advertise the canonical flag names
(--verbose, --dry-run) instead of the prefixed variants, and update
examples accordingly. Add tests covering both the shared-flag fallback
path and the command-specific override path, plus registry assertions
that deprecated flag names no longer appear in parameters or examples.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
